planDocSection: §4 Conformance Audit Methodology + §13.4 Execution Artifacts + §14.4 Definition of Ready
title: Phase 5.6 M-A T0 — Conformance Audit kickoff (authoring pass for docs/audits/2026-04-XX-conformance-audit.md)
status: queued — head-of-queue for the Phase 5.6 sprint sequence
predecessor: Phase 5.6 KICKOFF APPROVED 2026-04-17 — D1–D8 signed off as 'all yes' + M-E reorder adopted (ships BEFORE M-C/M-D) + PMP/Agile additions layered (product backlog, velocity KPI, change-control mini-gate, DoR). Kickoff artifacts produced this session: plan doc renamed proposal.md → remediation.md, Phase 5.6 banner added to Team-X/CLAUDE.md, 4 unpushed commits pushed to origin/main per D1 (8d5a0db + M36 T0/T1 chain), .loki/queue/pending.json updated with Phase 5.6 redirect + M36 T2+ explicit pause per D8, atomic docs(phase-5.6): + paired chore(loki): ledger commits land this session. Phase 6 M36 T2 (role-schema parser extension) paused with preservedWork on origin/main — resume condition: M-G retrospective committed + v1.1.1 tagged.
goal: Author the conformance-audit deliverable per plan §4 methodology: a markdown evidence matrix committed to docs/audits/2026-04-XX-conformance-audit.md with one row per discrete claim across CLAUDE.md status blocks (Phases 1 → 5), every IPC channel in the IPC Channels table, every bus event in the Phase 5 bus events table, every settings key referenced anywhere in CLAUDE.md, and every test-count assertion (1187 unit / 11 E2E / 12 Playwright cases). Every row has file:line reference or literal 'missing', a status (shipped / partial / missing / unverifiable), and a severity (P0 blocks core / P1 blocks promised / P2 nice-to-have / P3 cosmetic). Summary counts at top of doc. Cross-check pass on 20% of rows (Rocky spot-check or Codex CLI subagent). M-B then assigns disposition per gap row.
interimDoR: Plan doc approved + signatures recorded in §13 — DONE 2026-04-17
Phase 5.6 banner in CLAUDE.md — DONE kickoff session
.loki/queue/pending.json reflects Phase 5.6 redirect + M36 T2+ pause — DONE kickoff session
Audit doc target path allocated: docs/audits/2026-04-XX-conformance-audit.md (date filled in at authoring start)
M-A T0 plan doc to author optionally — M-A is methodology-driven per plan §4; full T0 plan doc per Phase 5 M28 T0 precedent is at Rocky's discretion
No predecessor sub-milestone (DoR #6): this is the first — predecessor is the kickoff itself, whose exit-KPI is this current-task.json file
acceptance: NEW docs/audits/2026-04-XX-conformance-audit.md with evidence matrix covering: (a) every CLAUDE.md status-block bullet in Phases 1–5, (b) every IPC channel in the Phase 2+3+5 IPC Channels table, (c) every bus event in the Phase 5 bus events table, (d) every settings key referenced in CLAUDE.md, (e) every test-count assertion
Per-row schema matches plan §4 exactly: claim, phase, milestone, evidence_type, expected_location, evidence_found, status, severity, notes, disposition (left blank for M-B)
Every row has non-empty evidence_found + status. Status values limited to: shipped | partial | missing | unverifiable
Every non-shipped row (partial / missing / unverifiable) has a severity in: P0 | P1 | P2 | P3
Summary table at top of doc counts shipped / partial / missing / unverifiable per phase
Cross-check pass on 20% of rows — either Codex CLI subagent run OR second authoring pass by Claude. Cross-check diff recorded inline in audit doc
Test-count claims verified by running pnpm test + pnpm -F @team-x/desktop test:e2e and counting; actual vs claimed reconciled in audit doc

Audit doc committed atomically as docs(phase-5.6-m-a): Phase 5.6 M-A — conformance audit evidence matrix (<XYZ> rows). Paired chore(loki): ledger advances pending.json tasksShipped → 1 and head-of-queue → M-B
Loki exit-KPI block closed: unitTests delta 0 (docs-only), e2eSpecs delta 0 (docs-only), atomic:ledger ratio 1:1, estimate vs actual variance recorded in ledger

Interim DoD (pre-M-E.1 template): plan doc approved, evidence matrix complete per schema, cross-check landed, pending.json advanced to M-B head-of-queue, CLAUDE.md banner updated to M-B phase if needed
filesTouched: .loki/queue/current-task.json (UPDATED — next task: Phase 5.6 M-B T0 Triage)
commitTemplate: docs(phase-5.6-m-a): Phase 5.6 M-A — conformance audit evidence matrix (<XYZ> rows)

verification.auditDoc: every row schema-compliant + every non-shipped row severity-assigned + summary table present + cross-check diff recorded

notes: M-A is the FOUNDATION of Phase 5.6. Every subsequent decision (M-B triage, M-C backend scope, M-D UI scope, M-E safeguard design, M-F doc rewrite) draws on the audit output. Without a thorough M-A, scope is guesswork.

Time-box is 5 working days + 2 days buffer (plan §4 locked). If audit runs longer, the gap is bigger than estimated — accept scope expansion per plan §8 R1 rather than rush. A 'finished early' M-A is more suspicious than a slow one.

Rocky's role in M-A: spot-check cross-validation on 20% of rows; final Gate review before M-B starts; sign-off on interim DoD. Claude's role: author the matrix, read code at file:line resolution, surface surprises, flag P0 severity gaps immediately.

If M-A surfaces gaps beyond the Phase 2 M7/M9/M11 already-known set (likely — Phase 3 + Phase 5 have never been formally audited against status blocks), scope expands under change-control mini-gate per §14.3. Audit is exhaustive regardless of scope implications.

Evidence types per plan §4 Schema: ipc_channel / ui_component / migration / test / hook / bus_event / settings_key / behavior. Each type has a canonical search pattern — IPC channels live in apps/desktop/src/main/ipc/register.ts and are the source-of-truth for 'does this channel exist'; bus events emit from services (grep for bus.emit); migrations in apps/desktop/src/main/db/migrations/; UI components in apps/desktop/src/renderer/src/features/.

After M-A lands: head-of-queue advances to M-B (Triage). M-B is 1-day + 0.5-day buffer, assigns restore/replace/deprecate per gap row using §5 decision criteria. M-E (Safeguards) then ships in parallel with M-B exit per approved schedule (§13.2).

M-A is docs-only. Zero test delta, zero E2E delta, zero IPC/bus/migration work. Verification gates: typecheck clean (no code change), lint clean (markdown), unit-test baseline preserved, E2E baseline preserved. Loki cadence: atomic docs(phase-5.6-m-a): + paired chore(loki): exit-KPI ledger — 1:1 ratio target.

Interim DoD footprint (M-A + M-B): until M-E.1 milestone DoD template lands, M-A and M-B use their acceptance blocks (this file's `acceptance` array for M-A; M-B's future current-task.json for M-B) as the DoD. After M-E.1 lands, M-C/M-D/M-F/M-G pick up the formal DoD template.

M-A HAS NO PREDECESSOR sub-milestone. The predecessor is the Phase 5.6 kickoff itself (this file + pending.json + CLAUDE.md banner + plan doc rename + git push = kickoff evidence). DoR item #6 (predecessor Loki exit-KPI closed) is satisfied by the kickoff ledger commit.
